chapter_title: Motor Transp. of Migrant Agricultural Workers
text: One seat must be provided for each passenger. Passengers shall remain seated while the vehicle is in motion.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 647. Motor Transp. of Migrant Agricultural Workers
##### § 647.014 — Passenger Seating

One seat must be provided for each passenger. Passengers shall remain seated while the vehicle is in motion.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 62, Sec. 17.34(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*
